description: Worked onboarding scenarios. operator_note is for human review only; agents use structured fields.

examples.context: 3-person vending op, first dedicated route driver, owner still drives 2 days/week
examples.log_row: Alex M,route_driver,2026-07-14,Jordan K,Y,2026-08-13,one missed par sheet,full,add coil ID to day-1 card
examples.operator_note: This is the hire that stops the owner from doing every Tuesday route. Week 1 is boring on purpose. Boring is good.

examples.context: Holiday coverage, college student, 3 days/week, never alone on full route week 1
examples.log_row: Sam T,route_filler_pt,2026-11-20,Chris P,Y,2026-12-20,none yet,partial,keep scope narrow
examples.operator_note: Part-time fillers fail when you give them a full route map day 2. One segment. One checklist. Expand after Thanksgiving rush.

examples.context: Warehouse helper for pick/pack, drivers complained about wrong loads
examples.buddy: Lead driver who sees loads daily
examples.log_row: Rosa V,warehouse_inventory,2026-08-01,Mike D,Y,2026-08-31,two wrong SKUs week 2,full,photo labels on overstock
examples.operator_note: Wrong loads are a customer complaint waiting to happen. Buddy must be someone who feels the pain when picks are wrong.

examples.context: Cafe counter, first employee who handles customers without owner on floor
examples.buddy: Owner for days 1-3 then shift lead
examples.cross_artifact: mf-tpl-001 cheat sheet before day 4 solo
examples.log_row: Jamie L,counter_customer,2026-09-05,Owner,Y,2026-10-05,one medium complaint handled ok,full,link complaint playbook in day-1
examples.operator_note: If they face customers, they get complaint recovery before solo rush. Non-negotiable.

examples.context: Owner never had a written onboarding process, first W-2 employee
examples.log_row: Taylor N,first_hire,2026-10-01,Owner,Y,2026-10-31,owner forgot cash rule doc,partial,this pack became our SOP
examples.operator_note: Greenfield owners learn alongside the hire. Day 30 output is your real SOP for hire #2.

examples.context: Driver quit Wednesday, replacement starts Friday, no handoff
examples.log_row: Pat R,route_driver,2026-06-20,Owner,Y,2026-07-20,unknown machine quirks doc gap,full,build machine quirk sheet
examples.operator_note: Crash mode is real life. Shrink the plan, do not pretend you have a two-week overlap.

examples.context: Retiring driver training replacement over 10 days
examples.operator_note: Best case. Outgoing writes five things only they know. Gold for the library.

examples.context: Small retail shop, third hire, stock + register, not vending
examples.log_row: Casey B,counter_customer,2026-04-15,Morgan,Y,2026-05-15,register void confusion,full,add void rule to day-1
examples.operator_note: Same bones as vending counter. Role templates travel; swap examples for the business type.
